changeSet.author: template
changeSet.comment: Create 'liquibase_lab' database if it does not exist

changeSet.author: template
changeSet.comment: Create login 'lab_user' for students who don't want to use 'sa'
changeSet.sql: IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys.sql_logins WHERE name = 'lab_user') BEGIN CREATE LOGIN lab_user WITH PASSWORD = 'LabPassword123!'; END

changeSet.author: template
changeSet.comment: Create user in liquibase_lab database and assign read/write/ddl roles
